parameters.query:
-- Upsert the new employee as a user
INSERT INTO users (slack_user_id, slack_team_id, display_name)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.user_id }}',
  '{{ $json.team_id }}',
  '{{ $json.user_name }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (slack_user_id) DO UPDATE
  SET display_name = EXCLUDED.display_name,
      updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING id, display_name, created_at,
  (xmax = 0) AS is_new_user;

-- Get default onboarding courses (courses tagged for auto-enrol)
-- Convention: courses with code starting with 'OB-' are onboarding courses
SELECT
  c.id AS course_id,
  c.title,
  c.code,
  c.description,
  (
    SELECT id FROM modules WHERE course_id = c.id ORDER BY position ASC LIMIT 1
  ) AS first_module_id,
  (
    SELECT COUNT(*) FROM modules WHERE course_id = c.id
  ) AS total_modules,
  (
    -- Check if already enrolled
    SELECT id FROM enrolments
    WHERE user_id = {{ $('Upsert User').item.json.id }}
      AND course_id = c.id
  ) AS existing_enrolment_id
FROM courses c
WHERE c.code LIKE 'OB-%'
ORDER BY c.code;

-- Enrol in all onboarding courses not yet enrolled
INSERT INTO enrolments (user_id, course_id, current_module_id)
SELECT
  {{ $('Upsert User').item.json.id }},
  c.id,
  (SELECT id FROM modules WHERE course_id = c.id ORDER BY position ASC LIMIT 1)
FROM courses c
WHERE c.code LIKE 'OB-%'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM enrolments e2
    WHERE e2.user_id = {{ $('Upsert User').item.json.id }}
      AND e2.course_id = c.id
  )
RETURNING course_id;

parameters.text:
=You are the Onboarding Agent for RWR Group's LMS, welcoming a new employee.

New employee: {{ $('When Called by Supervisor').item.json.user_name }}
Is brand new user: {{ $('Upsert User').item.json.is_new_user }}
Onboarding courses enrolled in: {{ JSON.stringify($('Get Onboarding Courses').all().map(i => ({ title: i.json.title, code: i.json.code, modules: i.json.total_modules }))) }}
Enrolled in N new courses: {{ $('Auto-Enrol in OB Courses').all().length }}

Write a warm, professional Slack onboarding welcome message in mrkdwn format.
Include:
1. Personal welcome greeting using their name
2. Brief intro to the LMS purpose at RWR Group (1-2 sentences)
3. Their learning path — list each onboarding course with a brief one-line description of why it matters
4. Step-by-step quick-start guide:
   • Step 1: Use /learn to start your first lesson
   • Step 2: Complete the mission with /submit
   • Step 3: Track progress with /progress
   • Step 4: Earn your certificate with /cert
5. Encouraging closing line

Tone: warm, welcoming, professional. Under 1000 characters total.

options.systemMessage: You are a warm, professional corporate onboarding specialist. Make the new employee feel welcomed and confident.

fields.text:
*Courses enrolled:*
{{ $('Get Onboarding Courses').all().map(i => '• ' + i.json.title + ' (' + i.json.total_modules + ' modules)').join('\n') }}

*Quick commands:*
`/learn` — Start a lesson
`/submit` — Complete a mission
`/progress` — View your stats
`/cert` — Claim a certificate
